title: The Sardine Bakery and the Rainbow Disco Birthday
summary: A dragonet named Dimatar visits the Eat and Greet Bakery on Pineberry Avenue, where a pink mouse named Sophie serves him unique treats like sardine cupcakes and fish coffee with milk. After bonding over the fishy snacks, Dimatar joins Sophie in preparing a special sprinkle-covered cake for their friend Flutter’s birthday. The group of dragonets and moles journeys to Croquet Road for a festive celebration featuring a humidifier gift and a lively dance-off to the song 'Rainbow Disco Unicorn.'

highlightQuote.text: It's a humidifier... because she has a cold.

transcript.text: Now, once upon a time...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong, Dimatar.
And Dimatar said, "Oh, who's at my castle?"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Sophie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who's that?
Sophie is a mouse on Pineberry Avenue. She came from Pineberry Avenue from the Eat and Greet Bakery.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Bakery? Well, I suppose that's interesting. Come on in, Sophie. And Dimatar opened the door.
I'm very nice. I'm very nice, said Sophie.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I'm glad to hear that. I'm usually nice. Uh, and what did Sophie look like?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Sophie looked like Mickey Mouse, but different. She is a mouse and she shaped like Mickey Mouse, but different. She's pink. And Dimatar, said Sophie, I have a pink dress under my blue apron with yellow flowers.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: My goodness, that's very attractive. I and my dragonet friends, we all just flap around in our scaly skin. You can see mine's purple, although it's faded a little bit because I am, to be honest, very old. But even though I'm old, it doesn't mean I can't enjoy a baked good or two. Now do you have sardine cupcakes? Or maybe a nice herring roll?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Herring roll? I have no herring rolls.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A nice salmon-flavored cake?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have no salmon-flavored cake.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, do you have anything fishy at all?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I do have a... well, well see, what did you say at the first part?
Uh, sardine cupcakes, I think.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I have sardine cupcakes, said Sophie.
You do? That's wonderful news!
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I hope you can smell them. Where you are, they are tasty. They're making a smell row from Sophie's...
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh! And Dimatar lifted his little lizard-like nose up in the air and did a sniff-sniff-sniff. Oh, why yes, I do smell something like a delicious fish-flavored baked good. Is that the direction your bakery is in?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: It's stay left to stay on Pineberry Avenue. That's the way it is. And the smell's coming from the left, so that's the way my bakery is.
Well, I'd love to go there. Would you show me the way?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. And Dimatar go left.
And so Dimatar and Sophie walked all the way to Sophie's bakery. And what was the name of the cupcake again, Dimatar?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: Uh, it's vanilla cupcake with a delicious salty sardine filling and vanilla icing.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, those are the white ones. The white ones.
Dimatar took a bite and suddenly he made the biggest smile. Ha ha! That's incredible! Wait till the rest of the dragonets hear about this.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Now, now, now, Dimatar, we have lots and lots of cups of fish coffee. Fish coffee with milk.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Fish coffee with milk? That sounds very interesting. He looked down at the cabinet and went, "Huh. That's funny."
What is it? said Sophie.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: You see that cake down at the bottom there? It's got some little holes, like maybe someone was nibbling it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, I didn't finish it, said Sophie. I had to plop the sprinkles in those holes but a customer came over and I was too late. I'm gonna finish it now. Tomorrow is Flutter's birthday.
Who's Flutter?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Flutter is a mouse, like me. She lives in Mouse Croquet on Croquet Road. You bring the cake that way with you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Can I bring all my dragonet friends?
You can surely do. I already blew in the orange sprinkles all around the bottom and now I'm doing the red sprinkles on the top.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: That cake looks beautiful. We'll bring that one for Flutter.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No, no. It was the next day after tomorrow.
Okay, well it was time for Flutter's big birthday party.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Seeger? Do you have your dragonet friends? It's time to go, said Dimatar's mom.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeger said, "Oh, I completely forgot!"
Yeah, Seeger's already there. Your old friend. And the Mischief Moles are there too.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: But I forgot to get Flutter a present. What are we gonna do?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, oh, oh! I already made Flutter a present. It's a humidifier because she has a cold.
Well, that's a very nice present. Are you ready to go to the party?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Actually, I am. Seeger, actually Dimatar, this is Flutter's house over here with the red roof.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Everyone arrived at Flutter's house. And what did they see there?
Flutter said, "Come in." Then Flutter smelled something. "Is that my cake you're carrying?"
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Why yes, Sophie baked you this cake. I'm so proud to be bringing it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she ate it up. They had a dance party.
What was the song that they danced to?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Disco unicorn, Rainbow Disco Unicorn.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Whoa! That was quite a move. Now it was time for giving presents.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Flutter, could you fill up your humidifier, said Dimatar's mom, Shiliko. I got you a humidifier, unwrap it and then fill it up.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: She said, "Thank you for that beautiful gift." And everyone said, "Thank you, bye-bye." And that's the end of our story.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Sophie
characters.description: The resilient owner and artisan of the Eat and Greet Bakery is a vibrant pink mouse with an iconic, rounded silhouette, typically found in a pink dress and a flour-dusted blue apron. A master of alchemical confections, she kneads life into glowing pink slime alongside her loyal companion, Wenden—a slime mouse who studies the science of her color-mixing. Her delicate appearance belies a legendary endurance, famously proven when she carried her brother Winston through the freezing wilds to the gates of Snow World.

characters.name: Flutter
characters.description: A sniffling resident of Croquet Road, this mouse braves a lingering cold to join the festivities as a cherished guest at Ova’s birthday celebration.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Shiliko
characters.description: Dimitar's mother who helps organize the trip to the party.

characters.name: The Mischief Moles
characters.description: A troupe of adventurous little moles who attended Flutter’s birthday party in sturdy galoshes, fresh from exploring the forest’s hidden trails and mossy hollows.

characters.name: Seeker's Mother
characters.description: One of the guests attending the birthday celebration.

places.name: Dimitar's Castle
places.description: Perched upon the scorched crags of the volcano, the weathered stone fortress where Dimitar and Hattie reside is dominated by a massive bell tower that echoes through the rising sulfurous mists.

places.name: Pineberry Avenue
places.description: A street where the Eat and Greet Bakery is located.

places.name: Sophie's Bakery
places.description: A shop known for making delicious treats.

places.name: Croquet Road
places.description: The street where Flutter the mouse lives.

places.name: Flutter's House
places.description: A house with a red roof where the birthday party takes place.
